callouts.text: The section restart is clear, but the first card lands almost immediately under the divider. A little more breathing room would improve the scan reset.
callouts.label: Tight restart

callouts.text: The uniform card treatment keeps the list tidy, but it also hides which skills are required first versus later additions.
callouts.label: Priority blur

callouts.text: This section carries hard-stop decisions, but the severity still feels close to the routine guidance above. Stronger warning semantics would help.
callouts.label: Needs escalation
